How I Built A 10K/mo Side Income Sharing Other People's Software Online (Make Money Online 2026)
Make money online in 2026 by sharing other people's software — no product creation, no coding, and no massive upfront investment required. This is exactly how I built a $10K/month side income as a software affiliate, and I'm breaking down the entire process step by step. If you've been looking for a realistic way to start an online business, this is the model I'd start with today.

Who Am I?
